title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF TERESA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ABORLAN, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1157 / 59 OG No. 40, 6826 (October 7, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3654, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF TERESA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ABORLAN, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Catubangan, Bato-Bato and Pinagdogoan in the Municipality of Aborlan, Province of Palawan, are constituted into a distinct and independent barrio of said municipality, to be known as the Barrio of Teresa.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1963.
